content: SECURITY DEFINER functions run as the function owner (postgres/superuser) and bypass RLS. PostgreSQL views created by the postgres user also bypass RLS. Tables created via SQL or Supabase Table Editor have RLS disabled by default (CVE-2025-48757 exploited this — 10.3% of Lovable apps exposed). SECURITY DEFINER functions must: (1) never live in exposed schemas, (2) never accept user-controlled parameters that enumerate other users' data, (3) explicitly re-enable RLS inside them if cross-user writes are the intent.
